title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 216 Cumberland Street in Rochester, New York, as the "Minister Franklin Florence Memorial Post Office".
stage_label: Ordered to be Reported by the Yeas and Nays: 23 - 15.
crs_summary: This bill designates the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 216 Cumberland Street in Rochester, New York, as the "Minister Franklin Florence Memorial Post Office".
last_action_text: Ordered to be Reported by the Yeas and Nays: 23 - 15.
